closeDelay.description: The duration from when the mouse leaves the trigger or content until the hover card closes.

defaultOpen.description: The initial open state of the hover card when uncontrolled.

defaultTriggerValue.description: The default trigger value when uncontrolled.

disabled.description: Whether the hover card is disabled.

id.description: The unique identifier of the hover card.

ids.type: Partial<{ trigger: string | ((value?: string) => string); content: string; positioner: string; arrow: string }>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the hover card. Useful for composition.

open.description: The controlled open state of the hover card.

openDelay.description: The duration from when the mouse enters the trigger until the hover card opens.

positioning.description: The positioning options for the hover card content.

value.description: The hover card machine returned by useHoverCard().
